# Elena Liu (刘颖诗)

> Trust & Safety Program Manager · AI Operations Manager · SF Bay Area

## Contact & Availability

- **Location:** San Francisco Bay Area, CA
- **Open to:** Trust & Safety PM, AI Operations Manager, AI Governance roles
- **Email:** yingshiliu.j@gmail.com
- **Website:** https://elanaliu.io
- **About (EN):** https://elanaliu.io/about
- **About (ZH):** https://elanaliu.io/zh
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/yingshi-liu
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/yingshill
- **No sponsorship needed**

## Professional Summary

Results-oriented Program Manager with 5+ years specializing in Trust & Safety infrastructure and AI-driven workflow automation. At Moody's Analytics, led the integration of 3 legacy moderation tools into a unified Internal Safety OS — reducing moderator onboarding time by 40%. Proven track record with AI/LLM in production: deployed LLM-assisted moderation assistant (22% accuracy improvement, 15% AHT reduction), automated 65% of Tier-1 content reports with ML classifiers, and built Python classification system expanding automation coverage 35%.

End-to-end ownership across discovery → specification → delivery → adoption, collaborating closely with AI Research, Engineering, Data, and Legal teams.

## Target Roles

1. **Trust & Safety Program Manager** — content moderation system design, policy enforcement, AI-driven moderation workflows
2. **AI Operations Manager** — LLM deployment, eval systems, automation pipelines, cross-functional stakeholder alignment
3. **AI Governance Specialist** — responsible AI frameworks, Safety Index design, Precision/Recall/FPR metrics, HITL systems

## Key Achievement: Moderation OS (Moody's Analytics)

Turned an LLM moderation assistant from "it exists" to "it works":

- **Unified 3 legacy moderation tools** into a single Internal Safety OS — 40% reduction in moderator onboarding time
- **Deployed LLM-assisted moderation agent** — 22% accuracy improvement, 15% AHT reduction
- **Defined Safety Index System** — automated evaluation strategy tracking Precision, Recall, and False Positive Rate
- **Led multi-agent Trust & Safety workflow** requirements and prioritization
- **Extended policy enforcement** across advertiser integrity and seller trust domains

Full case study: https://elanaliu.io/moderation-os

## Key Achievement: ML Content Triage Pipeline (Flip + LeanData)

### Flip (2022–2024)
- Automated **65% of Tier-1 content reports** using ML classifiers (Python / Scikit-learn)
- Improved **moderator decision speed 12%** — humans focused on complex edge cases
- Supported GenAI content policy enforcement tool pilot launch
- Feature engineering: TF-IDF text features + metadata signals + behavioral patterns

### LeanData (2020–2021)
- Standardized **JSON taxonomy** as single data contract across teams
- Built **Python auto-classification system** — 35% automation coverage expansion
- Reduced **manual reconciliation errors 30%**
- Established continuous data quality monitoring framework

Full case study: https://elanaliu.io/ml-pipeline

## Core Competencies

- **Trust & Safety Infrastructure:** Content moderation system design, tooling consolidation, MRD/BRD specifications, compliance governance
- **AI/LLM Workflow Automation:** LLM-assisted moderation, ML classifiers, automation coverage expansion, closed-loop feedback systems
- **Product Lifecycle Management:** Requirements discovery, MoSCoW prioritization, UAT coordination, post-launch hyper-care
- **Data Strategy & Governance:** JSON taxonomy standardization, data quality guardrails, cross-platform consistency
- **LLMOps & Eval Systems:** Automated evaluation pipelines, performance monitoring (Precision / Recall / FPR), model iteration feedback
- **Cross-functional Stakeholder Alignment:** Engineering, Data, Legal, and Business team collaboration; Agile / Scrum delivery

## Work Experience

### Moody's Analytics (2024–Present) — Product Operation Specialist
Leading Trust & Safety infrastructure modernization. Unified 3 legacy moderation tools into Internal Safety OS. Partnered with AI Research to deploy LLM-assisted moderator agent. Defined full automated evaluation strategy via Safety Index System.

### Flip (2022–2024) — Data Analyst
Built ML classification pipelines for Tier-1 content report automation. Supported GenAI policy enforcement tool pilot launch. Managed 100+ backlog items using MoSCoW prioritization.

### LeanData (2020–2021) — Data Governance Analyst
Standardized JSON taxonomy across teams. Built Python auto-classification system. Established data quality monitoring framework.

### Modis / Adecco / Akkodis (2018–2020) — Project Manager
Managed 4 concurrent IT infrastructure projects with 98% on-time delivery. Built real-time Power BI executive dashboard. Cross-functional agile delivery via Jira / Confluence.

## Open Source Projects

- **ai-content-moderation-edge-case-eval-framework** — Edge-case evaluation framework for LLM content moderation pipelines. Standardized precision/recall tracking, failure pattern taxonomy, reproducible eval suites. https://github.com/yingshill/ai-content-moderation-edge-case-eval-framework
- **ai-governance-red-team-control-pipeline** — Red-team control pipeline for AI governance and policy enforcement. Attack pattern classification, prompt injection defense, output consistency test suites. https://github.com/yingshill/ai-governance-red-team-control-pipeline

## Case Studies

- [Moderation OS (Moody's Analytics)](https://elanaliu.io/moderation-os): Operationalizing an LLM moderation platform — 3 legacy tools → unified Safety OS, Safety Index evaluation system, 22% accuracy improvement, 15% AHT reduction, 40% faster onboarding.
- [ML Content Triage Pipeline (Flip + LeanData)](https://elanaliu.io/ml-pipeline): ML classifiers automating 65% of Tier-1 content reports at Flip; JSON taxonomy + Python auto-classification expanding coverage 35% at LeanData.
